title: 2018 Topps Update Chrome Shohei Ohtani RC X-Fractor 23/99 PSA 10 GEM MINT
description:
2018 Topps Chrome Update Shohei Ohtani Rookie X-Fractor #/99 PSA 10 GEM MINT

Elite modern rookie of global superstar Shohei Ohtani, featuring the highly sought-after X-Fractor parallel limited to just 99 copies, with this example individually numbered 23/99. The 2018 Topps Chrome Update issue remains one of Ohtani’s most desirable rookie releases, combining chromium shine with sharp photography during his historic debut season.

Graded PSA 10 GEM MINT, this card offers pristine condition with outstanding surface gloss, crisp edges, and strong centering—qualities that are especially tough to achieve on Chrome parallels. The X-Fractor finish adds exceptional eye appeal with its signature refractor pattern, making it stand out in any high-end collection.

Low-pop, serial-numbered Ohtani rookies continue to be a cornerstone of modern baseball investing, and PSA 10 examples of sub-100 parallels are becoming increasingly difficult to acquire.

A premier centerpiece for any Shohei Ohtani, Angels, or modern rookie card collection.

title: 2016 National Treasures #5 Steph Curry 48/49 BGS 9 Auto 10
description:
A premier high-end card of NBA legend Stephen Curry, featured on the stunning Clutch Factor Jersey Autographs insert from the prestigious 2016 Panini National Treasures release. National Treasures represents the pinnacle of luxury basketball cards, known for its low print runs, premium materials, and elite on-card autographs.

This example is serial numbered 48/49, making it one of just 49 produced. It showcases a game-used or player-worn jersey swatch paired with Curry’s on-card signature—perfectly complementing the bold, elegant design of the Clutch Factor subset, which highlights some of the game’s most impactful performers in key moments.

Graded BGS 9 MINT with a flawless Auto grade of 10, this card offers outstanding presentation with sharp corners, clean surfaces, and strong overall eye appeal. The autograph is bold and well-executed, standing out beautifully against the premium card stock and patch window.

Curry’s legacy as a multi-time NBA champion, MVP, and transformative figure in modern basketball continues to drive strong demand for his premium autographed cards. National Treasures patch autos—especially limited inserts like Clutch Factor—are highly sought after for their combination of rarity, design, and star power.

A superb blend of elite player, limited print run, and high-grade condition, this Stephen Curry National Treasures jersey auto represents a cornerstone piece for any advanced basketball collection.

BGS Pop 1, Highest Graded

title: 1956 Topps #30 Jackie Robinson Gray Back PSA 8 NMMT
description:
Outstanding example of the classic 1956 Topps #30 card featuring Hall of Famer Jackie Robinson of the Brooklyn Dodgers. This desirable Gray Back variation has been professionally graded PSA 8 (NM-MT).

The card displays beautiful, vibrant color and sharp registration, giving the image exceptional eye appeal. The portrait and action scene combination from the 1956 Topps design makes this one of Robinson’s most popular post-rookie cards, and this example presents as a true stunner.

A high-grade vintage classic and a standout addition to any serious Robinson, Hall of Fame, or vintage baseball collection.
